_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Skill in using basic descriptive statistics and techniques (e.g., normality, model distribution, scatter plots).
reference_document_element_description: Knowledge of descriptive statistics, including measures of central tendency, dispersion, distribution shape, and correlation, and how to interpret each in a business context.
comments: DCWF ksa superset of WIDAI AB domain. AB-K-001 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: OP-K-005 (OP, cosine: 0.560), AI-K-002 (AI, cosine: 0.553).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.4/10 (raw 0.644). Shared vocabulary: [descriptive, distribution, statistics]. DCWF-only terms [basic, model, normality, plots, scatter, skill] vs WIDAI-only terms [business, central, context, correlation, dispersion, interpret] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.891 (P=0.893, R=0.888). Balanced P/R — the 14-word DCWF element and 23-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (100.0%). "Skill in using basic descriptive statistics and techniques (e.g., normality, mod" and "Knowledge of descriptive statistics, including measures of central tendency, dis" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.651 ≈ STS 0.644 (gap 0.007). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [descriptive, distribution, statistics] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 16.1%. Shared tokens: [descriptive, distribution, statistics]. DCWF-only: [basic, model, normality, plots, scatter, skill]. WIDAI-only: [business, central, context, correlation, dispersion, interpret].
